-0.0639*(-0.1977*x_2 + 0.7912*exp(0.4301*x_1) - 1)**2 + 0.055*(x_2 - 0.2792*exp(0.9805*x_1) + 0.6857)**2 - 0.0586*exp(-0.0176*sin(2.6021*x_1 - 6.611) - 0.1219*sin(4.4703*x_2 + 5.4723)) + 0.0511*sinh(2.1107*sin(0.5471*x_2 + 8.2061) - 0.4072*tanh(1.9219*x_1 - 2.8277) - 1.0059) - 0.4496

-0.1646*(-0.2499*x_2 + exp(0.4301*x_1) - 0.7001)**3 + 0.0797*(x_2 - 0.2792*exp(0.9805*x_1) - 0.3549)**2 - 0.0234*(-0.0314*sin(2.6021*x_1 - 6.611) - 0.2173*sin(4.4703*x_2 + 5.4723) - 1)**5 - 0.4355*sin(-1.8355*sin(0.5471*x_2 + 8.2061) + 0.3541*tanh(1.9219*x_1 - 2.8277) + 3.8646) + 1.5908
